_comment: sap-mcp-server 全ツールの単一正本（SSOT）。役割で分離: summary=何をするか(人間短文/matrix説明=modal機能概要) / aiDescription=どう使うか(技術詳細のみ:呼出パラメータ/パス/スコープ/クセ・重複回避) / auth/callPath/roles/officialUrl=構造化。 (1) index.ts が『summary.en + aiDescription』を連結して tool description としてビルド時バイナリへ焼込。 (2) mcp-admin MCP Tools 画面が各フィールドを参照（ビルド時 frontend へ同期）。

summary.ja: 接続(Destination)一覧

ro.ja: 開発・品証のみ参照

tools.aiDescription: Returns each destination's name and URL; the Description field indicates DEV/QAS/PRD usage.

summary.ja: セッション既定の接続を切替

ro.ja: 全環境で利用可

tools.aiDescription: After switching, tools that omit `destination` use this session default.

summary.ja: 現在の既定接続を表示

purpose.ja: 現在の既定 Destination を表示

ro.ja: 全環境で利用可

tools.aiDescription: Returns the current session-default destination name.

summary.ja: ABAP Function Module 呼出

full.ja: 全環境で参照・更新(commit時)
full.en: All envs: read; update on commit

ro.ja: 開発・品証で参照・更新(commit時)

tools.aiDescription: Arguments are ARRAYS of structs (a flat {KEY:val} object is NOT delivered): importing:[{name,value,abaptype}], tabparams:[{name,value=<row type name>,rows?=<JSON array string>}]. Required: client (SAP mandant) and destination. commit=true performs the update (works regardless of role). Verify parameter names/types via FUPARAREF (WHERE FUNCNAME='<FM>') before use — never fabricate FM signatures.

summary.ja: SAP テーブル動的 SELECT

ro.ja: 開発・品証で参照

tools.aiDescription: RFC_READ_TABLE equivalent (ABAP runs SELECT *, `fields` filters client-side). Required: client, destination. Keep each WHERE/options condition on ONE line (<=72 chars); splitting AND across array lines can concatenate without a space -> syntax error -> 0 rows (append a trailing space per line if you must split). ADT tools are lighter for large reads.

summary.ja: ADT で自由形式 SQL 実行

ro.ja: 開発・品証で参照

tools.aiDescription: SELECT only, via /sap/bc/adt/datapreview/freestyle. Required: client, destination. Hard limit is 255 chars PER SQL LINE (not a column-count limit) — split long statements across lines. Parameterized CDS `FROM I_View( P_X = '' )` returns 400; use a parameterless SELECT (`FROM I_View`) only.

summary.ja: ADT で Open SQL 実行

ro.ja: 開発・品証で参照

tools.aiDescription: Same endpoint and limits as sap_adt_freestyle (255 chars per line, SELECT only). Required: client, destination.

summary.ja: DDIC オブジェクト(テーブル/CDS)を SELECT *

ro.ja: 開発・品証で参照

tools.aiDescription: SELECT * a DDIC object (table / CDS view) without a WHERE clause. Required: client, destination; ddicName.

summary.ja: ABAP ソース読取

ro.ja: 開発・品証で参照

tools.aiDescription: Required: client, destination; name; objectType=program|fm (fm needs group).

summary.ja: ABAP レポート/プログラム作成・更新＋活性化

purpose.ja: ABAP プログラム作成/更新+活性化

full.ja: 開発環境で作成・更新

ro.ja: 開発環境で作成・更新

tools.aiDescription: Creates/updates then (default) activates. Requires full mcp scope, a DEV-role destination, a custom name (Z*/Y* or /NS/*), and client. Returns activation/syntax messages so errors can be fixed and resubmitted.

summary.ja: ABAP プログラム/CDS DDL 削除

full.ja: 開発環境で作成・更新

ro.ja: 開発環境で作成・更新

tools.aiDescription: objectType=program (default) or ddls (CDS DDL — works even for inactive-only views). Requires full mcp, DEV-role destination, custom name, client.

summary.ja: ABAP Function Module(SE37)作成・更新＋活性化

purpose.ja: Function Module 作成/更新+活性化

full.ja: 開発環境で作成・更新

ro.ja: 開発環境で作成・更新

tools.aiDescription: Creates/updates an SE37 FM then activates (function group auto-created; FM create requires processingType=normal). ONLY body-only / parameterless FMs — ADT rejects the *"…parameter interface comment block. For a FM WITH parameters, use RPY_FUNCTIONMODULE_INSERT via sap_call_fm instead. Requires full mcp, DEV-role destination, client.

summary.ja: Cloud Transport Management v2 API

purpose.ja: 移送リクエスト一覧(nodeId+status+top/skip 必須)

ro.ja: 開発・品証で参照のみ

tools.aiDescription: GET /v2/nodes/{nodeId}/transportRequests requires a NUMERIC nodeId + `status` (2-char codes in,ru,re,su,wa,er,fa,de; missing -> 422) + paging `top`/`skip` (NOT $top/$skip). Import: POST /v2/nodes/{nodeId}/transportRequests/import with body {transportRequests:[<id>]}. Owner resolves createdByNamedUser -> createdBy.

summary.ja: Datasphere 公開 REST/OData API

purpose.ja: タスクチェーン実行/監視

ro.ja: 開発・品証で参照のみ

tools.aiDescription: Technical User. SAC-routed APIs REQUIRE header x-sap-sac-custom-auth: true (else the tenant returns the SPA HTML page). Public APIs: /api/v1/dwc/catalog/*, /api/v1/datasphere/*, /api/v1/scim2/*, /api/v1/audit/*. The internal /dwaas-core/api/v1/* is FORBIDDEN for Technical User clients (403 forbiddenOperationForTupOAuthClient).

summary.ja: Cloud ALM REST API

purpose.ja: ステータスイベント(アラート)取得
イベント状況をクローズ(acknowledge)
ITSM: サポートケースID一覧

ro.ja: 開発・品証で参照のみ

tools.aiDescription: Base https://<region>.alm.cloud.sap/api. Scopes are granted on the service-instance (xs-security.authorities $XSMASTERAPPNAME.calm-api.<area>.read/write), NOT on the key — a route returns 403/404 when the instance lacks the scope. If the Destination URL already ends in /api, omit the leading /api in the path arg (send /calm-projects/... not /api/calm-projects/...). Alerts: GET /api/bsm-service/v1/events (scope calm-api.bsm.read). Acknowledge/close: PUT /api/calm-event-situations/v1/event-situations/{id} (scope calm-api.event-situations.write). Tasks require projectId. ITSM — SAP Support Backbone cases (tickets), base /api/calm-itsmapi/v1/supportcases (note the path segment is calm-itsmapi, not calm-itsm; doc https://help.sap.com/docs/cloud-alm/apis/itsm-api). ITSM needs THREE things beyond the scope: (1) instance scopes calm-api.itsm.read + .write + .personal.read/.personal.write (contacts & personal data) + .attachments.read/.write; (2) TWO destinations created in the Cloud ALM tenant's OWN subaccount (NOT the consumer subaccount that holds this OAuth destination), ClientCertificateAuthentication using an S-user SAP Passport (.pfx) certificate — calm_itsm_support -> https://apps.support.sap.com/ and calm_itsm_documents_service -> https://documents.support.sap.com/ ; Cloud ALM resolves them by the caller token's tenant/zoneid, so they must live in that CALM subaccount; (3) reporter must be an S-user holding SAP-side case authorizations (read/create/close) granted in SAP for Me for the target customer number. Error map: 403 = instance is missing the itsm scope; 500 'Destination not found in SAP BTP' = the two ITSM destinations are absent in the CALM subaccount; 428 'not authorized ... customer number' = reporter S-user lacks case authorization. Read GETs (all take reporter=): /supportcases/cases/ids?customerNumber=|installationNumber= (list case ids), /supportcases/cases?id= (case detail), /supportcases/cases/activities|attachments|comments|contacts?id=, /supportcases/masterdata/components (CSN component tree, no reporter), /supportcases/masterdata/landscapeObjects (customer systems + customerNbr/installationNbr), /supportcases/masterdata/contacts?customerNumber= (needs personal.read). Write: POST /supportcases/cases (create; itsm.write; body priority/component/systemId/installationNumber/subject/description/customerNumber/reporter; priority 1 requires businessImpact) and PATCH /supportcases/cases?id=&reporter= (update). AI self-service: POST /supportcases/recommendations/solutions|categories (body description). Limits: 50 requests/min (429 over), cases closed >3 months are not returned, payload max 30MB.

summary.ja: JIRA REST API（外部アプリ / Apps & Services）
summary.en: JIRA REST API (external app / Apps & Services)

full.ja: 全環境で全操作（起票/遷移/コメント/照会）

ro.ja: 開発・品証(DEV/QAS)で全操作可・本番は不可

tools.aiDescription: Generic JIRA REST passthrough. mTLS client cert + bearer are resolved by the Destination — pass only method/path/body. path is relative to the destination base URL (do NOT include host or the /prot prefix; e.g. /rest/api/2/issue/{key}). Common: create issue POST /rest/api/2/issue; read GET /rest/api/2/issue/{key}; transition GET then POST /rest/api/2/issue/{key}/transitions; comment POST /rest/api/2/issue/{key}/comment; Service Desk POST /rest/servicedeskapi/request; search GET /rest/api/2/search?jql=. Ref: https://developer.atlassian.com/cloud/jira/platform/rest/v3/intro/#. Permissions are gated by the destination role: mcp_readonly may perform ALL operations but only on DEV/QAS destinations (PRD is 403); mcp full has all environments.

summary.ja: SmartDB REST API v3（外部アプリ / Apps & Services）
summary.en: SmartDB REST API v3 (external app / Apps & Services)

tools.auth: NoAuthentication + 静的 bearer（バインダトークン・Destination の URL.headers.Authorization で解決）

purpose.ja: バインダ詳細/ビュー一覧
文書 参照/登録/更新/削除
業務プロセス/アクティビティ

full.ja: 全環境で全操作（文書 CRUD/プロセス実行）

ro.ja: 開発・品証(DEV/QAS)で全操作可・本番は不可

tools.aiDescription: Generic SmartDB (DreamArts) REST API v3 passthrough. The binder token (static bearer) is resolved by the Destination — pass only method/path/body. The destination base URL already ends in /hibiki/rest/3, so path is relative to it (do NOT include host or /hibiki/rest/3; e.g. /binders/{binder}). A binder token is scoped to ONE binder — calls to other binders return 403. Common: binder detail GET /binders/{binder}; views GET /binders/{binder}/views; documents of a view GET /binders/{binder}/views/{view}/documents (returns {documents,totalCount,pageSize}); document detail GET /binders/{binder}/documents/{document}; create POST /binders/{binder}/documents; update PUT /binders/{binder}/documents/{document}. Ref: https://doc.support-dreamarts.com/SmartDB/Document/RestDocDocumentV3/index.html. Permissions are gated by the destination role: mcp_readonly may perform ALL operations but only on DEV/QAS destinations (PRD is 403); mcp full has all environments.
